name: Golden Triangle Tour with Pushkar
overview: Explore the best of Delhi, Agra, Jaipur, Pushkar with our expertly crafted tour package. Mother India Tour Travels provides comfortable AC vehicles, experienced guides, and hand-picked accommodations to make your journey unforgettable.
inclusions: Accommodation in listed or similar hotels
All transfers and sightseeing by private AC vehicle
All long distance travel as per itinerary
Chauffeur, Toll Taxes, Parking, Fuel charges
State Taxes, Green Taxes, Road Taxes
exclusions: Personal expenses (porterage, tips, laundry, mineral water)
Monument entrance fees and camera charges
Any activity not mentioned in inclusions
Additional cost due to flight cancellation, roadblocks, political unrest
notes: Taj Mahal is closed every Friday
Prices are per person on twin sharing basis

itinerary.title: Delhi: Arrival at Delhi Airport company representative assist you and transfer t
itinerary.description: Delhi: Arrival at Delhi Airport company representative assist you and transfer to the hotel. Overnight stay at the hotel.

itinerary.title: Delhi to Agra (230 Kms
itinerary.description: Delhi to Agra (230 Kms. 3-4 Hrs.): Today after breakfast proceed to Agra & a guided tour to visit Taj Mahal, Agra. Overnight stay at the hotel.

itinerary.title: Agra to Jaipur (260 Kms
itinerary.description: Agra to Jaipur (260 Kms. 6 Hrs. Approx.): After breakfast drive to Jaipur En-Route visit Fatehpur Sikri . Overnight stay at the hotel Jaipur.

itinerary.title: After breakfast, a guided tour to visit the ancient capital of Amber and visit b
itinerary.description: After breakfast, a guided tour to visit the ancient capital of Amber and visit beautiful Amber fort & proceed to the pink city Jaipur we will visit Water Palace, Hawa Mahal (Window Palace), City Place and Observatory (Jantar Mantar) after visit famous block printing & James & Stone cutting factory work being done since centuries in Jaipur. Overnight stay at the hotel.

itinerary.title: Jaipur to Pushkar (150 Kms
itinerary.description: Jaipur to Pushkar (150 Kms. 3 Hrs.): Today after breakfast, proceed to Pushkar, check in at the hotel & after refresh visit Brahma Temple , Pushkar Lake, City Walking tour & overnight stay at the hotel.

itinerary.title: Pushkar to Delhi (415 Kms
itinerary.description: Pushkar to Delhi (415 Kms. 7-8 Hrs. Approx.): Today after breakfast proceed to Delhi & stop for lunch (direct payment basis). Overnight stay at the hotel.

itinerary.title: After breakfast, a guided tour to visit Red fort, Jama masjid, India Gate, Lotus
itinerary.description:
After breakfast, a guided tour to visit Red fort, Jama masjid, India Gate, Lotus temple, Qutub minar & drop you at the Airport/Railway Station with sweet memories.
Please note: Taj Mahal Close on Every Friday
